alkylation reagent: alkylated with 50 mM Iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 50 mM Iodoacetamide (IAA) for 30 min in the dark.
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (trypsin: protein = 1:20, w/w) at 37 °C.
enrichment method: purified the complex using a tandem affinity purification protocol.
instrument: analyzed using Orbitrap Eclipse (Thermo Fisher) mass spectrometer.
labeling: Mass Spectrometry analysis confirmed co-purification of endogenous members...
reduction reagent: terminated by the addition of DTT-containing SDS sample buffer.
reduction concentration: terminated by the addition of DTT-containing SDS sample buffer.
